msg: warning: Variable buf is a dead store!
reasoning: Line 26 is 'buf = malloc(bufsize);'. Under !def(CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP), the #ifdef block at lines 29-33 (which contains the only use of buf: 'if (buf) { free(buf); }') is excluded from compilation. Consequently, buf is assigned by malloc at line 26 but never subsequently read or freed — a genuine dead store and memory leak. Presence condition !def(CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP) correctly captures the configuration where the cleanup block is absent. The vbdb entry for eef2317b9f5 documents the uninitialized buf bug under def(CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP) — a different finding. New true positive.
